# E-Commerce Platform

## Auth Epic
Implement authentication and authorization for the platform.

### Login Task
Build the login flow with email and password.

#### Email Validation Task
- Implement email regex check
- Add autocomplete support

#### Password Field Task
- Implement password strength meter
- Add show/hide toggle

### Register Task
Build the user registration flow.

#### Profile Setup Task
- Implement avatar upload
- Add display name field

## Catalog Epic
Implement the product catalog and browsing experience.

### Product List Task
Build the product listing page with filters.

#### Search Filter Task
- Implement full-text search
- Add category filter dropdown

### Product Detail Task
Build the product detail page.

## Critérios de aceite
- O sistema deve autenticar usuários com email e senha
- O sistema deve listar produtos com filtros
- O sistema deve exibir detalhes do produto
